你又識唔識咩叫邏輯呀？

你也一樣、你也是或訴諸偽善（拉丁語：Tu quoque）是一種訴諸人身的非形式謬誤，是主張某人也做了他所批評的事，因此其論點無效。「你也一樣」謬誤是一種積非成是，也是訴諸人身謬誤。

Tu quoque is a type of ad hominem argument in which an accused person turns an allegation back on his or her accuser, thus creating a logical fallacy.

Example:
Mother: You should stop smoking. It's harmful to your health.
Daughter: Why should I listen to you? You started smoking when you were 16!

https://www.thoughtco.com/tu-quoque-logical-fallacy-1692568
